children.name: Div
children.text: How do families choose the right program?

children.name: Div
children.text: The consultation page collects the student grade, goals, and preferred start date so the academy can recommend a suitable program path.

children.name: Div
children.text: Can the timetable be updated for seasonal terms?

children.name: Div
children.text: Yes. The timetable layout is a self contained template page, so the academy can revise class blocks without touching backend business logic.

children.name: Div
children.text: Does this template require extra plugins or modules?

children.name: Div
children.text: No. The current version is a standalone user template that stays compatible with installation and activation using the existing template manager.
